posts.author: mmawizzard
posts.body: Here I'll post everything:-The UFC signings and the replacements-The monthly update of all the points earned-Where you will submit your 100pts wager, and who you will be placing it onFor all the rules, you can find everything here .

posts.author: 138 MMA
posts.body: I'd like to wager my 100pts. Carter Cox to win at DCS 104 on Jan 31st. Either he wins or I'm eliminated. Might as well find out early.
